Package org.jbox2d.common

Class Vec2

java.lang.Object
org.jbox2d.common.Vec2
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Vec2 extends Object implements Serializable
A 2D column vector.
Author:
Daniel Murphy
See Also:

      Get the skew vector such that dot(skew_vec, other) == cross(vec, other)

      public final void skew(Vec2 out)
      Get the skew vector such that dot(skew_vec, other) == cross(vec, other)

    • length

      public final float length()
      Get the length of this vector (the norm). Return the length of this vector.
      Repolink:
      Github: erincatto/box2d include/box2d/b2_math.h Lines 88 - 92

    • lengthSquared

      public final float lengthSquared()
      Get the length squared. For performance, use this instead of length(). Return the squared length of this vector.
      Repolink:
      Github: erincatto/box2d include/box2d/b2_math.h Lines 94 - 99

    • normalize

      public final float normalize()
      Convert this vector into a unit vector. Returns the length. Normalize this vector and return the length before normalization. Alters this vector.
      Repolink:
      Github: erincatto/box2d include/box2d/b2_math.h Lines 101 - 114

    • isValid

      public final boolean isValid()
      Does this vector contain finite coordinates? True if the vector represents a pair of valid, non-infinite floating point numbers.
      Repolink:
      Github: erincatto/box2d include/box2d/b2_math.h Lines 116 - 120
